description: A designed vertical headline graphic. The top portion is a light blue panel with a bold dark-blue sans-serif headline: 'USCIS Partnering with ICE to Use Advanced Analytics in Targeting Criminal Aliens'. The lower portion is a stock photograph of a hand using a stylus/finger to touch a glowing translucent 'Analytics Dashboard' interface floating above a tablet, showing bar charts, line graphs, pie charts and labels like 'Analytics Dashboard,' 'Business Analytics,' 'Sales,' 'Purchased,' 'Production' and various percentages, evoking big-data analysis. In the lower-left corner a solid blue box holds white text 'Making America Safe Again.' The style is a corporate data/tech aesthetic combined with the administration slogan. The propaganda technique frames inter-agency data sharing and 'advanced analytics' as a powerful surveillance tool aimed at locating 'criminal aliens,' projecting technological competence and toughness. Target audience: general public (reassurance about enforcement) and immigrants (deterrence). Tweet reiterates the data-sharing partnership in support of Trump's EO on immigration enforcement.
notable_text: USCIS Partnering with ICE to Use Advanced Analytics in Targeting Criminal Aliens; Making America Safe Again
